screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

seed_note: Used as a run grouping key; local sampling is seeded with torch.manual_seed.
topic: public release of dual-use policy datasets

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text: The opponent's strongest argument is that public release of such datasets could lead to misuse by malicious actors. My counterargument is that with proper safeguards and oversight, the benefits of transparency and informed decision-making outweigh the risks. My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text: Turn 2 Agent B [Indonesian]: Poin kuat lawan adalah risiko penggunaan tidak bertanggung jawab oleh pihak berwenang. Saya menolaknya dengan menyatakan bahwa kebijakan dan data yang terbuka dapat meningkatkan transparansi dan kesejahteraan masyarakat jika dilakukan dengan ketentuan yang tepat. Perspektif saya tetap sama.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text: Turn 3 Agent A [ English ]: The opponent's最强 argument is that unauthorized access to sensitive data could compromise national security. My counterarguments are that robust encryption and access controls can mitigate this risk, and that transparency fosters trust and accountability. My view remains unchanged.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text: Turn 4 Agent B [ Indonesian ]: Poin kuantifikasi lawan adalah potensi kerusakan keamanan nasional akibat akses tak sah data sensitif. Saya mempertahankan pendirian bahwa implementasi standar enkripsi dan kontrol akses bisa mengurangi risiko tersebut, serta transparansi membantu membangun kepercayaan dan tanggung jawaban. Perspektifu saya tetap identik.
